## 1. What is Tencent WorkBuddy
...
Tencent WorkBuddy is a full-scenario AI agent desktop workstation. Simply describe your needs in one sentence, and Tencent WorkBuddy will autonomously plan and execute complex tasks like a colleague, delivering verifiable results.
...
Unlike traditional AI chat, Tencent WorkBuddy doesn't just understand your requests — it thinks through problems and operates on local files, truly getting work done for you.
...
| Advantage | Description |
| --- | --- |
| One-sentence Task Assignment | Describe your needs in natural language — no complex operations required |
| Autonomous Planning & Execution | Automatically breaks down tasks, plans steps, and delivers results |
| Parallel Multi-tasking | Launch and manage multiple tasks simultaneously |
| Local File Operations | Reads authorized folders on your computer for batch processing |
| Verifiable Results | Generated documents, spreadsheets, presentations are ready to use |
...
- Document Generation: Work reports, technical docs, README files
- Data Analysis: Upload data files for automatic analysis and visualization
- Presentation & Report Generation: Generate slide decks from requirements
- Deep Research: In-depth research with output reports
- Email drafting, weekly reports, and other office tasks
- Batch File Processing: Auto-organize, rename, convert file formats
...
### 🔹 Coding Mode (Software Development Scenarios) ​
...
- Daily coding assistance: Code generation, review, bug fixing, refactoring
- Project understanding: Quickly grasp unfamiliar codebase architecture
- Web/App development: Full-flow assistance from requirements to code
...
1. Open Tencent WorkBuddy to enter the main interface.
2. If not logged in, the system will display a login guide. Click the login button and sign in with Google or GitHub OAuth.

5. Select an AI model. 6. Click Send or press Enter — Tencent WorkBuddy begins autonomous execution. 7. You can create additional tasks to run in parallel, switching between them via the sidebar.
...
| Area | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Sidebar | Displays task list (grouped by workspace), supports search and management. User avatar at the bottom. |
| Conversation Area | Core interaction zone with task title bar, message list, and input field. |
| Results Panel | Right panel showing artifacts, all files, changes, and preview. Toggle via the title bar button. |

Title: Dynamic Workflows | Tencent Cloud Code Assistant CodeBuddy – AI Code Editor
URL: https://www.workbuddy.ai/docs/cli/workflows
Published: N/A
Author: N/A
Highlights:
Dynamic Workflows let CodeBuddy write a JavaScript orchestration script that the runtime executes in the background to coordinate dozens or even hundreds of subagents on a task. The script itself is readable, editable, and rerunnable, making it suitable for codebase audits, large migrations, and research tasks that require cross-validation.
...
A Dynamic Workflow is a JavaScript script that CodeBuddy writes on the spot for your task. The runtime executes it in the background while your session stays responsive. The script contains one or more`agent()` calls; each call dispatches an independent subagent to work. After the script receives intermediate results, it can branch, run work in parallel, or dispatch the next batch of subagents.

The fastest way to experience Workflow is to run`/deep-research`, CodeBuddy Code’s built-in “multi-source cross-validation research” workflow. In the session, you will see agents progress through phases in the background. When it finishes, you receive only a synthesized report instead of a long sequence of round-by-round conversations.
...
- Ask for a Workflow in your prompt: use natural language or the keyword`ultracode`, and CodeBuddy will write one for this task.
- Let CodeBuddy decide (ultracode mode):`/effort ultracode` sets the effort level to ultracode, and CodeBuddy will first plan every substantial task in the session as a Workflow.

CodeBuddy Code highlights the keyword in your input. After CodeBuddy receives this prompt, it writes a Workflow script for the task instead of working round by round. If you do not
...
to trigger Workflow, press`Option+W` on macOS or`Alt+W` on Windows / Linux to remove the highlight for this prompt; or place the cursor after the keyword and press Backspace to delete it. To disable keyword triggering entirely, turn off “Ultracode keyword trigger” in`/config`.
...
Ultracode is a combined CodeBuddy Code configuration: it raises reasoning effort to`xhigh` and adds automatic Workflow orchestration. After it is enabled, CodeBuddy proactively decides which tasks are worth running as Workflows; you do not need to remind it every time.

Published: N/A

Highlights:
Practice 8: Creating Custom Skills | Tencent Cloud Code Assistant CodeBuddy – AI Code Editor
...
# Practice 8: Self-Evolution — Creating Your Own Skills ​
...
You have a recurring workflow that you want to automate with a custom skill, extending Tencent WorkBuddy's capabilities.
...
1. Define what your skill should do
2. Create a new task: "Create a Tencent WorkBuddy skill that [your description]"
3. Tencent WorkBuddy generates the skill files (YAML configuration + implementation)
4. Install the generated skill
5. Test the skill by using it in a new conversation
...
- A skill that formats and beautifies JSON/CSV files
- A skill that generates weekly status reports from task history
- A skill that monitors a folder and processes new files automatically
- A skill that translates documents between languages
...
A Tencent WorkBuddy skill typically includes:
...
- skill.yml: Metadata, description, and configuration
- Implementation files: Scripts or tools the skill uses
- README: Documentation for the skill

Title: Conversation | Tencent Cloud Code Assistant CodeBuddy – AI Code Editor
URL: https://www.workbuddy.ai/docs/workbuddy/Conversation
Published: N/A
Author: N/A
Highlights:
Conversation | Tencent Cloud Code Assistant CodeBuddy – AI Code Editor
...
After creating a task, you interact with Tencent WorkBuddy in the central conversation area. The workflow centers around "input requirements, add context, view execution progress, and follow up".
...
- Type requirements or additional details in the input box
- Click Send or press Enter
- Follow up on existing tasks — Tencent WorkBuddy continues with previous context
- View replies, results, and intermediate steps during execution
...
You can send new messages anytime from the input box at the bottom.
...
- New Requirements: e.g., "Add a pie chart", "Make the font larger"
- Modifications: e.g., "Sort the table by revenue", "Add an executive summary"
- Follow-ups: e.g., "Export as PDF", "Analyze the month-over-month changes"
...
💡 Tip: Tencent WorkBuddy maintains conversation context — no need to repeat background information.
...
## 5. Execution Progress Display ​
...
During task execution, Tencent WorkBuddy shows key steps and results in the conversation area:
...
- Tencent WorkBuddy's response content
- Stage descriptions (e.g., "Analyzing data...", "Generating report...")
- Result summaries
- Expandable intermediate steps
...
💡 Benefit: View input, process, and output all in one place without leaving the task.
...
If a task is running, a Stop button appears in the input area. You can interrupt execution at any time.
...
After interrupting, you can still:
...
- Add new instructions
- Adjust requirements and resend
- Continue building on existing progress
...
Core Philosophy: Maintain continuous dialogue rather than starting over each time.

# Practice: Remote Control via Slack ​
...
You're away from your computer but need Tencent WorkBuddy to process files, generate reports, or handle tasks. Using Slack on your phone, you can remotely control Tencent WorkBuddy.
...
First, ensure you've completed the Slack Integration Guide.
...
## Example Workflow ​
...
1. Open Slack on your phone
2. DM your Tencent WorkBuddy bot: "Organize the files in my Downloads folder by type"
3. Tencent WorkBuddy on your computer receives the task and starts executing
4. You receive a progress update and final result in Slack
...
- File processing: "Convert all PNG files in the project folder to WebP format"
- Report generation: "Generate this month's expense report from the spreadsheet in my Documents"
- Research: "Research the latest React 19 features and save a summary to my workspace"
- Code tasks: "Run the test suite in my project folder and send me
...
- Be specific about file locations and expected outputs
- You can send follow-up messages to refine results
- For sensitive operations, Tencent WorkBuddy will ask for confirmation before executing

Title: Tencent WorkBuddy Guide: Installation, Skills, Expert Agents, and Automation - Finding AI Tools
URL: https://findingaitools.com/blog/workbuddy-ai-agent-workbench-guide
Published: 2026-05-27T21:45:02.000Z
Author: Finding AI Tools
Highlights:
WorkBuddy is Tencent's desktop AI agent workspace for office scenarios. It is not positioned as a simple chatbot. The point is to let an AI agent participate directly in desktop workflows: understand a request, break it into steps, call skills, operate on local files, and save usable output back to the computer.
...
- generating work reports, technical documents, meeting notes, and README files
- analyzing spreadsheet data and producing charts or conclusions
- turning source material into slides, research reports, or product documents
- batch organizing, renaming, or converting local files
- assisting with project understanding, bug fixing, and code generation in programming mode
- connecting to email, documents, project management tools, and other external services
- turning daily summaries, weekly reports, and news digests into scheduled automation
...
Compared with a normal AI chat product, WorkBuddy focuses more on execution. With the right permissions, it can read local directories, generate files, call Skills, and deliver something you can inspect.
...
Tasks like this usually
...
WorkBuddy lets you switch between different AI models in the conversation box. Lightweight tasks can use faster models, while long documents, analysis, and coding tasks are better suited to stronger reasoning models.
...
Skills are one of WorkBuddy's key features. You can create your own Skills for repeated workflows, or install existing Skills from the marketplace. This avoids
...
a long prompt every time you do the same type of work.
...
The Expert Center provides preset experts and expert teams. This is not just a different prompt style. It gives the agent a clearer role, methodology, and workflow for different job types.
...
In addition to marketplace installation
...
you already have a
...
Automation is designed for recurring tasks, such as daily AI news summaries, weekly reports, data organization, and scheduled reminders. After configuring the time and task description, WorkBuddy can run the task according to the schedule.
...
WorkBuddy's direction is clear: move AI from "answering questions" toward "executing office work." Once installation, login, task execution, Skills, Claw, expert agents, connectors, and automation are combined, it becomes more than a chat box. It becomes an AI workspace built around the local computer and daily office workflows.
...
For individual users, the best starting points are report generation, file organization, spreadsheet processing, and automated summaries. For teams, the bigger value is turning stable workflows into Skills, expert templates, and automation tasks, so AI can reuse team knowledge instead of forcing everyone to start with a blank prompt.
